# tui-vfx Capabilities Reference

This document provides a complete inventory of visual effects available in tui-vfx.

---

## Table of Contents

1. [Masks (Transition Shapes)](#masks-transition-shapes)
2. [Filters (Post-Processing)](#filters-post-processing)
3. [Samplers (Coordinate Distortion)](#samplers-coordinate-distortion)
4. [Spatial Shaders (Per-Cell Styling)](#spatial-shaders-per-cell-styling)
5. [Style Effects (Temporal Animations)](#style-effects-temporal-animations)
6. [Content Transformers (Text Effects)](#content-transformers-text-effects)
7. [Shadows](#shadows)
8. [Quick Reference](#quick-reference)

---

## Masks (Transition Shapes)

| Effect | Description | Use Cases |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| **Blinds** | Venetian blinds effect | transition, presentation |
| **Cellular** | Cellular/organic pattern reveal | transition, organic, creative |
| **Checkers** | Checkerboard pattern reveal | transition, retro, playful |
| **Diamond** | Diamond-shaped expand from center | transition, dramatic |
| **Dissolve** | Random pixel dissolve effect | transition, dream-sequence, magical |
| **Iris** | Iris/spotlight reveal from center | transition, dramatic, spotlight |
| **NoiseDither** | Dithered noise pattern reveal | transition, retro, subtle |
| **None** | No mask applied — content is fully visible | none, baseline, passthrough |
| **PathReveal** | Path-based reveal (spiral, radial sweep) | transition, creative, animated |
| **Radial** | Radial reveal expanding from configurable origin | transition, dramatic, reveal |
| **Wipe** | Linear wipe reveal/hide from one edge to another | transition, reveal, cinematic |

## Filters (Post-Processing)

| Effect | Description | Use Cases |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| **BracketEmphasis** | Brackets that appear around content based on progress | hover, selection, emphasis |
| **BrailleDust** | Stochastic braille dust for frosted glass texture | ambient, texture, premium |
| **ColorBridgedShade** | Color-bridged shade for smooth opacity rendering | opacity, fade, subtle |
| **Crt** | CRT monitor post-processing effect | retro, gaming, nostalgic |
| **Dim** | Dim/darken the output | background, inactive, subtle |
| **DotIndicator** | Simple dot/bullet indicator adjacent to content | selection, navigation, indicator |
| **GlistenSweep** | Diagonal glisten sweep effect | hover, shine, premium |
| **Greyscale** | Greyscale/desaturate filter using BT.601 luminance | disabled, inactive, dramatic |
| **HoverBar** | Progress-driven partial bar indicator for hover states | hover, selection, indicator |
| **InterlaceCurtain** | Scanline/interlace effect for backdrop dimming | retro, loading, effect |
| **Invert** | Invert colors | highlight, dramatic, selection |
| **KittScanner** | Horizontal ping-pong scanner effect (KITT/Larson) | hover, retro, sci-fi |
| **MotionBlur** | Motion blur trail effect with directional dimming | movement, speed, dynamic |
| **None** | No filter effect | none, baseline, passthrough |
| **PatternFill** | Pattern fill effect for background textures | texture, background, decoration |
| **PillButton** | Pill-shaped button with gradient edges | button, hover, premium |
| **RigidShake** | Rigid body shake filter with damped oscillation | error, attention, tactile-feedback, notification |
| **ShadeScanner** | Ping-pong scanner that dims text with shade overlay | hover, reveal, retro |
| **SubCellShake** | Sub-cell shake using partial vertical blocks | error, tactile, feedback |
| **SubPixelBar** | Sub-pixel progress bar with 8x resolution | loading, progress, indicator |
| **Tint** | Apply a color tint | mood, branding, overlay |
| **UnderlineWipe** | Horizontal underline that wipes in based on progress | hover, link, indicator |
| **Vignette** | Vignette darkening around edges | focus, cinematic, premium |

## Samplers (Coordinate Distortion)

| Effect | Description | Use Cases |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| **Crt** | CRT monitor effect with scanlines and curvature | retro, gaming, nostalgic |
| **CrtJitter** | CRT crash/jitter effect with decay | glitch, error, retro |
| **FaultLine** | Fault line displacement effect | glitch, error, dramatic |
| **None** | No coordinate transformation | none, baseline, passthrough |
| **Ripple** | Circular ripple distortion from center point | water, impact, attention |
| **Shredder** | Paper shredder effect with alternating strips | glitch, transition, destruction |
| **SineWave** | Sinusoidal wave distortion | wavy, underwater, dream |

## Spatial Shaders (Per-Cell Styling)

| Effect | Description | Use Cases |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| **AmbientOcclusion** | Contact shadow effect darkening cells near widget edges | depth, premium, 3d |
| **BarberPole** | Animated diagonal stripes like a barber pole | loading, progress, playful |
| **Bevel** | 3D embossed edge effect with configurable light direction | 3d, buttons, emboss |
| **BorderSweep** | Highlight that traces the border edge | selection, focus, highlight |
| **ChromaticEdge** | Chromatic aberration effect separating RGB edges | glitch, premium, effect |
| **FocusedRowGradient** | Vertical gradient centered on a selected row | selection, list, navigation |
| **GlistenBand** | Moving band of light that sweeps across the widget | loading, premium, shine |
| **GlitchLines** | Random horizontal glitch interference lines | error, glitch, dramatic |
| **Glow** | Multi-cell bloom/halo effect around widget edges | focus, premium, highlight |
| **Highlighter** | Marker-style highlight revealing text | emphasis, reveal, attention |
| **LinearGradient** | Static color gradient across widget | background, premium, branding |
| **NeonFlicker** | Flickering neon sign effect with independent segments | retro, neon, ambient |
| **PulseWave** | Rippling color wave emanating from position | attention, loading, ambient |
| **Radar** | Rotating radar-style sweep effect | scanning, loading, tech |
| **Reflect** | Moving reflective glint band | premium, loading, shine |
| **RevealWipe** | Progressive reveal from one direction, hiding unrevealed text | reveal, transition, text |
| **StochasticSparkle** | Film grain / frosted glass effect with random cell brightening | premium-surface, frosted-glass, texture, ambient |
| **SubCellShake** | Micro-jitter visual effect through rapid color oscillation | error, vibration, attention |

## Style Effects (Temporal Animations)

| Effect | Description | Use Cases |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| **ColorFade** | Color fade toward target | transition, mood, branding |
| **ColorShift** | HSL color shift animation | mood, transition, effect |
| **FadeIn** | Fades in from transparent/black | enter, reveal, transition |
| **FadeOut** | Fades out to transparent/black | exit, hide, transition |
| **Glitch** | Random glitch distortion with modifiers | error, dramatic, cyberpunk |
| **ItalicWindow** | Italic modifier during time window | emphasis, animation, text |
| **NeonFlicker** | Neon sign flicker effect (temporal) | retro, neon, ambient |
| **Pulse** | Pulsing color intensity effect | attention, heartbeat, ambient |
| **Rainbow** | Rainbow color cycling effect | playful, pride, celebration |
| **RigidShakeStyle** | Italic synced with RigidShake filter | error, attention, sync |
| **Spatial** | Static color gradient across widget | custom, advanced |

## Content Transformers (Text Effects)

| Effect | Description | Use Cases |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| **Dissolve** | Character-level dissolve effect | transition, fade, pixel |
| **GlitchShift** | Horizontal shift glitch effect | glitch, error, cyberpunk |
| **Marquee** | Scrolling marquee text | scrolling, ticker, news |
| **Mirror** | Mirror/reverse text effect | effect, playful, reflection |
| **Morph** | Text morphing transition | transition, smooth, creative |
| **Numeric** | Numeric formatting effect | data, counter, dashboard |
| **Odometer** | Vertical scrolling digit counter | counter, retro, mechanical |
| **Redact** | Text redaction/censorship effect | censorship, reveal, dramatic |
| **Scramble** | Character scramble/decode effect | decrypt, reveal, tech |
| **ScrambleGlitchShift** | Combined scramble and glitch shift effect | glitch, decrypt, dramatic |
| **SlideShift** | Sliding text with row jumps | transition, slide, animation |
| **SplitFlap** | Airport/train station split-flap display | retro, airport, mechanical |
| **Typewriter** | Classic typewriter reveal effect | reveal, typing, narrative |
| **WrapIndicator** | Prefix/suffix wrapper for indicators | hover, selection, emphasis |

## Shadows

| Effect | Description | Use Cases |
|--------|-------------|----------|
| **Braille** | Braille patterns for dithered/density-based shadows | depth, fine, subtle |
| **Gradient** | Multi-layer gradient shadow with decreasing intensity | depth, soft, premium |
| **HalfBlock** | Half-block characters for soft sub-cell shadows | depth, premium, modal |
| **Solid** | Solid color cells (space with background color) | depth, compatible, simple |

## Quick Reference

### Effect Categories by Use Case

**data_display**:
- Shaders: Highlighter, RevealWipe
- Content: Odometer, SplitFlap, Numeric

**error_feedback**:
- Filters: RigidShake, SubCellShake
- Shaders: GlitchLines, SubCellShake, NeonFlicker
- Content: Scramble, GlitchShift

**focus_selection**:
- Shaders: BorderSweep, PulseWave, FocusedRowGradient, Glow

**hover_selection**:
- Filters: HoverBar, UnderlineWipe, BracketEmphasis, DotIndicator, GlistenSweep, KittScanner, ShadeScanner, PillButton
- Shaders: FocusedRowGradient, BorderSweep, Glow
- Content: WrapIndicator

**loading**:
- Filters: BrailleDust, SubPixelBar, MotionBlur, PatternFill
- Shaders: BarberPole, StochasticSparkle, GlistenBand
- Content: Typewriter

**premium_surfaces**:
- Filters: BrailleDust, Vignette, ColorBridgedShade
- Shaders: StochasticSparkle, GlistenBand, LinearGradient, AmbientOcclusion, Bevel, Glow

**retro_crt**:
- Filters: Crt, InterlaceCurtain
- Shaders: NeonFlicker
- Content: SplitFlap, Odometer

**transitions**:
- Masks: Wipe, Iris, Dissolve, Blinds, Radial, Diamond

### Effects by Mood

- **elegant**: GlistenBand, Iris, LinearGradient, Glow, StochasticSparkle
- **minimal**: Wipe, FadeIn, FadeOut, Dim
- **playful**: Dissolve, Rainbow, BarberPole, BrailleDust, Checkers
- **professional**: StochasticSparkle, Wipe, FadeIn, LinearGradient, HalfBlock
- **retro**: Crt, NeonFlicker, SplitFlap, Odometer, InterlaceCurtain
- **urgent**: RigidShake, SubCellShake, GlitchLines, CrtJitter, FaultLine
